name: Source Address is a Known Questionable IP
notes: Adjusts the severity of events and flows when the source IP is a known questionable host.
conditions_text: when the source IP is a part of any of the following HostileNets
TD_list: APPLY Source Address is a Known Questionable IP on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the source IP is a part of any of the following HostileNets
